assets.notes: Exact approved visual direction: broad athletic male Fighter using oversized reinforced metal gauntlets in a forward boxing/martial stance, warm red-brown palette, no sword and no shield. The approved chat image has not yet been imported into the repository or technically verified, so this remains concept-approved rather than canonical-approved.

Female woodland Archer visual direction is approved: olive-green hood/cape, bow and quiver, serious combat-ready 3/4 full-body pose. The existing assets/archer.png remains only a technically valid procedural placeholder and is not the approved final artwork; import and verify the approved replacement before canonical approval.

A new green chibi Slime visual candidate was generated in the approved project style, but no exact file has been imported or technically verified in the repository. Older V5 references also have uncertain identity/provenance. Keep as candidate-present until a specific original-project PNG is imported, alpha-checked, and approved.

A stronger rock-and-blue-crystal Golem visual candidate was generated, while assets/mon_golem.png remains a minimal procedural placeholder. No replacement file has yet been imported or verified, so retain candidate-present status and do not treat the root placeholder as final Stage 5 boss art.
Keep the existing Warden asset. It is not assigned to Map 1, but may be reused for a later map or mode after a separate design decision. Do not delete or auto-map it to Stage 5.
